COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-26-2002 Text Ruling

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-22-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on regular calendar this day for settlement conference. Plaintiff appearing by and through counsel, Michael Sherwood Rossoff, Esq. Defendants Adriana Scott and Martin Carl appearing in Pro Per. Case did not settle at conference but is in the process of settling after receipt of payments. Trial date of August. 26,2002 confirmed.
